subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-24
subcodes.first_line: Bahá'u'lláh lived in ‘Akká nine years. Two years were passed in the barracks and seven years in a house in the city. There was a mobilization at that time
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals
